name: Multi-stage pressure campaign
description: User reports being pressured or asked to act now after a chain of unknown events.

warning.title: High-pressure social engineering
warning.message: You are being asked to act under pressure. Do not transfer money, do not install apps, do not enter card data. Verify through your bank's or authority's official phone number.

recommendation: Pause for 30 minutes. Call a trusted contact. If still in doubt, do nothing — pressure is itself the warning sign.
